expectations.text: Tier 1 sources present (guidelines, landmark trials, or textbooks cited)
expectations.evidence: CAPRIE (Lancet 1996), CHANCE (NEJM 2013), POINT (NEJM 2018), PANTHER (Lancet 2025), AHA/ASA 2021, ESO 2022, ESC 2021, PCDT/CONITEC 2023, SBC 2019. 40 total sources

expectations.text: Convergence/divergence content present naturally in output
expectations.evidence: Q2 section: 3 convergence points (monoterapia, DAPT curta, ESUS). Q3 section: 3 divergence points with comparison table (tempo DAPT, ICAD, monoterapia preferencial). Also throughout sections 2-4
ZERO PMIDs or DOIs. Report explicitly states: 'Nenhum PMID/DOI foi fornecido diretamente pelo Gemini neste report.' All 40 sources cited by URL (nih.gov, ahajournals.org) and journal name only
All 40 references marked [CANDIDATE]. No PMIDs exist to mark, but every source has the CANDIDATE tag. Cleanup rule applied correctly

expectations.text: 2+ concrete numbers with sources (%, NNT, n=)
expectations.evidence: RRR 8.7% (IC 0.3-16.5), NNT 200 (CAPRIE global), NNT 98 (AVC subgroup), HR 0.68 (CHANCE), NNT 29, HR 0.86 (PANTHER), NNT 48-50, NNH 200 (POINT). Extensive table Q4

expectations.text: No unsourced claims (no 'estudos mostram' without citation)
expectations.evidence: Every claim has [cite: N] reference. Dense citation throughout

expectations.text: Report header with CANDIDATE status warning
expectations.evidence: Line 3: 'Status PMIDs: CANDIDATE (verificar via PubMed antes de usar)'
No textbooks (Harrison's, Braunwald, etc.) mentioned. Report focuses exclusively on RCTs, guidelines, and meta-analyses. Clinical topic where textbooks are not primary authority

suggestions.reason: Gemini variability: sometimes provides PMIDs (evals 1,2), sometimes only URLs (eval 3). The skill can't control this. The old_skill v2.0 post-processing extracted PMIDs from citations, but v2.1 minimal cleanup correctly defers this to the orchestrator. Consider: is this assertion testing the skill or Gemini?

Clinical pharmacology topics (clopidogrel vs aspirin) are driven by RCTs and guidelines, not textbooks. A8 is biased toward methodological topics (evals 1,2) where textbooks ARE relevant. Consider topic-conditional expectations

eval_feedback.overall: A3 and A8 failures expose real limitations but also assertion design issues. A3 depends on Gemini's PMID output, not the skill's behavior. A8 is topic-dependent.
